faqs.question: How much does bee removal cost in Pomonok?
faqs.answer: Bee removal services in Pomonok typically range from $350 to $550, depending on colony size, location accessibility, and nest complexity. We provide free estimates and transparent pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Do you relocate bees or exterminate them?
faqs.answer: We prioritize humane bee relocation whenever possible, working with local beekeepers to safely transport colonies. Extermination is only used as a last resort for aggressive species or when relocation isn't feasible for safety reasons.

faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service for most Pomonok locations. Emergency situations involving large swarms or indoor infestations receive priority scheduling to ensure resident safety.

faqs.question: Are bee removal services safe for my Pomonok apartment or home?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our certified technicians use specialized equipment and proven techniques that protect your property while safely removing the colony. We also seal entry points to prevent future infestations in your Pomonok residence.
